---
title: "mar25_activity"
author: "Steph Krieger"
format: html
editor: visual
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: inline
---
```{r}
library(tidyverse)
USAccDeaths
```

```{r}
deaths <- as.data.frame(matrix(USAccDeaths, nrow = 6, ncol = 12, byrow = T))
deaths <- deaths |> 
  mutate(year = 1973:1978) |>
  rename("jan" = V1, "feb" = V2, "mar" = V3,
         "apr" = V4, "may" = V5, "jun" = V6,
         "jul" = V7, "aug" = V8, "sep" = V9,
         "oct" = V10, "nov" = V11, "dec" = V12) |>
  relocate(year)
```

```{r}
deaths_longer <- deaths|> pivot_longer(cols = -year,
                       names_to = "Month",
                       values_to = "Deaths"
)

deaths_longer <- deaths_longer |>
  mutate(Month = factor(Month, ordered = T))
```

```{r}
deaths_wider <- deaths_longer |> pivot_wider(names_from = "Month", values_from = "Deaths")
```
